---
title: "Mouse Tooth Development TAI Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

library(biomaRt)
library(myTAI)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library("cowplot")

raw_data <- read.table("table_STAR_mus_ham_TPM.tsv", 
                       sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

gene_names <- raw_data[, ncol(raw_data)]
expression_data <- raw_data[, -ncol(raw_data)]
rownames(expression_data) <- gene_names
```


```{r Merge metadata with expres_data and average expression across replicates}
metadata_mapping <- function() {
  
  # Create a lookup table from your metadata
  stage_lookup <- data.frame(
    Sample_ID = c(
      "Mus_Rep1_md12.5", "Mus_Rep1_md13.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx12.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx13.5",
      "Mus_Rep2_md12.5", "Mus_Rep2_md13.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx12.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx13.5"
    ),
    Stage = "BUD",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    rbind(data.frame(
      Sample_ID = c(
        "Mus_Rep1_md14.5", "Mus_Rep1_md15.0", "Mus_Rep1_mx14.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx15.0",
        "Mus_Rep2_md14.5", "Mus_Rep2_md15.0", "Mus_Rep2_mx14.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx15.0",
        "Mus_Rep2.1_md14.5", "Mus_Rep2.1_mx14.5"
      ),
      Stage = "CAP",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )) %>%
    rbind(data.frame(
      Sample_ID = c(
        "Mus_Rep1_md15.5", "Mus_Rep1_md16.0", "Mus_Rep1_md16.5", "Mus_Rep1_md17.0", "Mus_Rep1_md17.5",
        "Mus_Rep1_mx15.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx16.0", "Mus_Rep1_mx16.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx17.0", "Mus_Rep1_mx17.5",
        "Mus_Rep2_md15.5", "Mus_Rep2_md16.0", "Mus_Rep2_md16.5", "Mus_Rep2_md17.0", "Mus_Rep2_md17.5",
        "Mus_Rep2_mx15.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx16.0", "Mus_Rep2_mx16.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx17.0", "Mus_Rep2_mx17.5"
      ),
      Stage = "BEL",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )) %>%
    rbind(data.frame(
      Sample_ID = c(
        "Mus_Rep1_md18.0", "Mus_Rep1_mx18.0", "Mus_Rep2_md18.0", "Mus_Rep2_mx18.0",
        "Mus_Rep2.1_md18.0", "Mus_Rep2.1_mx18.0"
      ),
      Stage = "DIF",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )) %>%
    rbind(data.frame(
      Sample_ID = c(
        "Mus_Rep1_md19.5", "Mus_Rep1_md22.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx19.5", "Mus_Rep1_mx22.5",
        "Mus_Rep2_md19.5", "Mus_Rep2_md22.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx19.5", "Mus_Rep2_mx22.5"
      ),
      Stage = "SEC",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  
  # Get mouse samples from expression data
  mouse_samples <- colnames(expression_data)[grepl("^Mus_", colnames(expression_data))]
  
  # Create final metadata by matching samples
  final_metadata <- data.frame(
    Sample_ID = mouse_samples,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    left_join(stage_lookup, by = "Sample_ID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Stage)) %>%
    mutate(
      Species = "Mus",
      Tissue = str_extract(Sample_ID, "m[dx]"),
      Tissue_Label = case_when(
        Tissue == "md" ~ "Mandible",
        Tissue == "mx" ~ "Maxilla",
        TRUE ~ "Unknown"
      )
    )
  
  return(final_metadata)
}


sample_info <- metadata_mapping()

table(sample_info$Stage, sample_info$Tissue)
table(sample_info$Stage)

# Process each tissue
process_tissue <- function(tissue_code, tissue_name) {

  # Get samples for md/mx
  samples <- sample_info %>% filter(Tissue == tissue_code)
  
  # Extract expression data
  tissue_expr <- expression_data[, samples$Sample_ID]
  
  # Average by stage
  stage_averages <- data.frame(GeneID = rownames(tissue_expr))
  
  # Process each stage with log transformation
  all_stages <- c("BUD", "CAP", "BEL", "DIF", "SEC")
  for(stage in all_stages) {
    stage_samples <- samples$Sample_ID[samples$Stage == stage]
    if(length(stage_samples) > 0) {
      if(length(stage_samples) == 1) {
        stage_averages[[stage]] <- log2(tissue_expr[, stage_samples] + 1)
      } else {
        stage_averages[[stage]] <- rowMeans(log2(tissue_expr[, stage_samples] + 1), na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    } else {
      stage_averages[[stage]] <- rep(0, nrow(tissue_expr))
    }
  }
  
  # Remove stages with all zeros
  stages_with_data <- all_stages[sapply(all_stages, function(s) sum(stage_averages[[s]] > 0) > 0)]
  stage_averages <- stage_averages[, c("GeneID", stages_with_data)]
  
  # Remove genes with all zeros
  has_expression <- rowSums(stage_averages[, -1]) > 0
  result <- stage_averages[has_expression, ]
  
  return(result)
}

# Process both tissues
mandible_data <- process_tissue("md", "Mandible")
maxilla_data <- process_tissue("mx", "Maxilla")

summary(mandible_data)
```


```{r Map to phylostrata}

map_to_phylostrata <- function(data, tissue_name) {

  # Filter genes
  all_genes <- data$GeneID
  # standard_genes <- all_genes[grepl("^[A-Z][a-z]", all_genes)]
  standard_genes <- all_genes[nchar(all_genes) > 0]
  
  # Set up biomaRt
  ensembl <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")
  
  # Get gene to protein mapping
  gene_to_protein_map <- getBM(
    attributes = c("external_gene_name", "ensembl_peptide_id"),
    filters = "external_gene_name",
    values = standard_genes,
    mart = ensembl
  ) %>%
    setNames(c("GeneID", "ProteinID")) %>%
    filter(!is.na(ProteinID), ProteinID != "", !is.na(GeneID), GeneID != "") %>%
    mutate(ProteinID_clean = gsub("\\..*", "", ProteinID))
  
  # Map proteins to phylostrata
  map_mouse_protein <- phylomapr::Mus_musculus_ENSEMBL_GRC38mm10.PhyloMap
  
  map_protein_clean <- map_mouse_protein %>%
    mutate(ProteinID_clean = gsub("\\..*", "", GeneID)) %>%
    group_by(ProteinID_clean) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::select(ProteinID_clean, Phylostratum)
  
  # Group by gene and take minimum phylostratum
  gene_to_phylo <- gene_to_protein_map %>%
    dplyr::select(GeneID, ProteinID_clean) %>%
    inner_join(map_protein_clean, by = "ProteinID_clean") %>%
    group_by(GeneID) %>%
    summarise(Phylostratum = min(Phylostratum), .groups = 'drop')
  
  return(gene_to_phylo)
}

# Map both tissues
mandible_phylo <- map_to_phylostrata(mandible_data, "Mandible")
maxilla_phylo <- map_to_phylostrata(maxilla_data, "Maxilla")

summary(mandible_phylo)

```


```{r myTAI datasets}
mytai_dataset <- function(expr_data, phylo_map, tissue_name) {
  # Merge expression with phylostrata
  mytai_data <- expr_data %>%
    inner_join(phylo_map, by = "GeneID") %>%
    select(Phylostratum, GeneID, everything()) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Phylostratum), Phylostratum > 0) %>%
    
    mutate(
      Phylostratum = as.numeric(Phylostratum),
      GeneID = as.character(GeneID)
    ) %>%
    # Convert expression columns to numeric
    mutate(across(3:ncol(.), as.numeric)) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  return(mytai_data)
}

mandible_mytai <- mytai_dataset(mandible_data, mandible_phylo, "Mandible")
maxilla_mytai <- mytai_dataset(maxilla_data, maxilla_phylo, "Maxilla")

summary(mandible_mytai)
```


```{r TAI Analysis}
perform_tai_analysis <- function(mytai_data, tissue_name) {
  
  # Create S7 object
  phylo_set <- as_BulkPhyloExpressionSet(mytai_data)
  
  # Compute TAI
  tai_values <- TAI(phylo_set)
  
  # Create results
  results <- data.frame(
    Tissue = tissue_name,
    Stage = names(tai_values),
    TAI = as.numeric(tai_values),
    Stage_Order = match(names(tai_values), c("BUD", "CAP", "BEL", "DIF", "SEC")),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  print(results)
  
  return(list(
    results = results, 
    phylo_set = phylo_set,
    mytai_data = mytai_data
  ))
}

mandible_tai <- perform_tai_analysis(mandible_mytai, "Mandible")
maxilla_tai <- perform_tai_analysis(maxilla_mytai, "Maxilla")

saveRDS(mandible_tai, "mouse_tai_results.rds")
```

```{r}
calculate_phylostratum_trajectories <- function(expression_data, phylostratum_map, tissue_name) {
  
  expr_with_phylo <- expression_data %>%
    inner_join(phylostratum_map, by = "GeneID") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Phylostratum), Phylostratum > 0)
  
  if(nrow(expr_with_phylo) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Filter out phylostrata with <= 5 genes
  valid_strata <- expr_with_phylo %>%
    count(Phylostratum) %>%
    filter(n > 5) %>%
    pull(Phylostratum)
  
  expr_with_phylo <- expr_with_phylo %>%
    filter(Phylostratum %in% valid_strata)
  
  # Get stage columns
  stage_cols <- setdiff(names(expr_with_phylo), c("GeneID", "Phylostratum"))
  
  # Calculate mean expression per phylostratum per stage
  phylo_trajectories <- expr_with_phylo %>%
    group_by(Phylostratum) %>%
    summarise(
      across(all_of(stage_cols), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
      Gene_Count = n(),
      .groups = 'drop'
    )%>%
    # Filter out phylostrata with zero expression in any stage
    filter(if_all(all_of(stage_cols), ~ .x > 0))
  
  # Reshape for analysis
  trajectory_long <- phylo_trajectories %>%
    select(-Gene_Count) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = -Phylostratum,
      names_to = "Stage",
      values_to = "Mean_Expression"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      Tissue = tissue_name,
      Stage_Order = match(Stage, c("BUD", "CAP", "BEL", "DIF", "SEC"))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Stage_Order))
  
  return(list(
    trajectories_wide = phylo_trajectories,
    trajectories_long = trajectory_long,
    expression_data = expr_with_phylo
  ))
}

mandible_trajectories <- calculate_phylostratum_trajectories(mandible_data, mandible_phylo, "Mandible")
maxilla_trajectories <- calculate_phylostratum_trajectories(maxilla_data, maxilla_phylo, "Maxilla")
  
```


```{r Combined plot}

mandible_tai$phylo_set@name <- "Mandible"
maxilla_tai$phylo_set@name <- "Maxilla"

# Panel A - TAI comparison
bulk_list <- c(mandible_tai$phylo_set, maxilla_tai$phylo_set)
panel_a <- plot_signature_multiple(bulk_list, legend_title = "Tissue") + 
  labs(title = "A. Mouse TAI Analysis Across Tooth Development: Mandible vs Maxilla",
       x = "Developmental Stage", y = "Transcriptome Age Index (TAI)")

# Panel B - Phylostratum trajectories
phylostratum_trajectories <- bind_rows(
  mandible_trajectories$trajectories_long %>% mutate(Tissue = "Mandible"),
  maxilla_trajectories$trajectories_long %>% mutate(Tissue = "Maxilla")
)
plot_data <- phylostratum_trajectories %>% mutate(Phylostratum = factor(Phylostratum))
panel_b <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Stage_Order, y = Mean_Expression, color = Phylostratum, group = Phylostratum)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, alpha = 0.8) + geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Tissue, ncol = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = c("BUD", "CAP", "BEL", "DIF", "SEC")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name = "Phylostratum", option = "turbo") +
  labs(title = "B. Phylostratum Expression Trajectories", x = "Developmental Stage", y = "Mean Log2(Expression + 1)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 0.3),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.3), legend.position = "right") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1, override.aes = list(size = 2)))

combined_plot <- plot_grid(panel_a, panel_b, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 1.3), labels = NULL)

ggsave("TAI_combined_mandible_maxilla.pdf", combined_plot, width = 12, height = 12, bg = "white")

```
